summary: checkCvss validates C/I/A metrics with a bool map before reading impactMetric so invalid values (e.g. C:GARBAGE) error out instead of silently scoring as C:N.
reason: Go map zero-value returns 0 for unknown keys, which is also the legitimate value for C:N / I:N / A:N. The pre-existing av/ac/ui/pr zero-check could not validate CIA without false-rejecting C:N. A separate validity check is the minimal fix. Greptile P1 on PR #459.
